rationale: Educ. Code §13.159 governs public inspection and hearings for school district consolidation agreements. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 13.159. PUBLIC INSPECTION AND HEARING. (a) A local consolidation agreement under Section 13.158 must be made available for public inspection during regular business hours at the central administration building of each district for at least 25 days before the consolidation election.
_note: No conflict; rule text concerns school district consolidation procedures, not homestead exemption amounts.
